case_title: JOANNA E. SALAZAR VS. BRANDON AUSTIN

docket_entries.description: REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,630.00 FILED BY SALAZAR, JOANNA E. AS TO DEFENDANT AUSTIN, BRANDON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-14-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OR DEFENDANT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: DISMISSED W/O PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
